zh.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes於1448年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波。他和Sarah McColl至少有1個女兒。他去世在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes于1448年出生在苏格兰艾丁波。他和Sarah McColl至少有1个女儿。他去世在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Chung, Chang, Jian, Li, Tong, Bin, Chao, Cheng, Chin, Chuan, Der, Feng, Fung, Hua.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 穆, meaning ‘solemnity, virtue’: (i) from Mu (穆), posthumous title of the Duke Mu of Song (died 720  BC ), the 14th ruler of the state of Song (located in present-day Shangqiu in Henan province). He earned the title Mu, 穆, because of his virtue during his reign. (ii) from the Qiu Mu Ling (丘穆陵) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient northern China, who changed their original surname to Mu (穆) during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from Mu (穆), posthumous title of the Duke Mu of Lu (died 377  BC ), ruler of the state of Lu (located in present-day Shandong province).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 慕: (i) said to be traced back to Yu Mu (虞慕), ancestor of the legendary Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ). (ii) shortened form of the compound surname Mu-Rong (慕容), a surname from the Xianbei and Tuyuhun ethnic group in northern China. (iii) a surname from Korean and Jurchen ethnic groups in northeastern China.

variants.name: Moo
meanings: Chinese: variant of   Mu  .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 巫, possibly based on its Hakka pronunciation, see   Wu   4.
Burmese (Karen): variant of   Mu   9.

variants.name: Wu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Jian, Mei, Jing, Ying, Bin, Hong, Jin, Ping, Ching, Wen.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 吳, meaning ‘big, large’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Wu (吳), the name of a state (located in present-day Jiangsu province) which was granted to Tai Bo, the first son of King Tai of Zhou (died c. 1146 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Yue in 473 BC , people from the state adopted 吳 (Wu) as their surname. (ii) from the placename Yu (虞) (located in present-day Shanxi province). Because Yu (虞) had a similar pronunciation to that of Wu (吳) in ancient Chinese, some people acquired Wu (吳) instead of Yu (虞) as their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Innes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McInnis , from Gaelic Mag Aonghuis ‘son of Aonghus’.
Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Innes in Urquhart (Morayshire), named from Gaelic inis ‘island’.
English: variant of   Ince  .

variants.name: Inniss
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Innes  .

variants.name: Ince
meanings: habitational name from Ince in Makerfield (Lancashire), Ince (Cheshire), or Ince Blundell (Lancashire). The placenames derive from Proto-Welsh ïnïs ‘island’.

possibly a post-medieval West Midlands variant of Hints, a habitational name from either of two places called Hints (Staffordshire, Shropshire). The placenames probably derive from Proto-Welsh hïnt ‘way, path’ + Middle English plural -es.

possibly a variant with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s of Inn, from residence at an inn or inns, from Middle English in (singular) or innes (plural) ‘tavern, lodging(s), tenement(s)’. There seems also to have been some confusion with Scottish Innes .

variants.name: Inch
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Innes  .
English: perhaps, at least in some cases, a variant of   Ince  .
English: variant of   Hinch  .

variants.name: McInnis
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aonghuis, a patronymic from the personal name Aonghus (see Angus ). See also McInnes , compare Irish McGinnis .

variants.name: Innis
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Innes  .
English: variant of   Ince  .

variants.name: Inness
meanings: Scottish (Durham and Northumberland): variant of   Innes  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes was born in 1448, in Edinburgh, Scotland. He had at least 1 daughter with Sarah McColl. He died in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes est né en 1448, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sarah McColl. Il est décédé à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes wurde 1448 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren. Er hatte mit Sarah McColl mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes è nato il nel 1448 nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sarah McColl. Morì nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes(은)는 1448년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났다. 그는 Sarah McColl(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes nasceu em 1448, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sarah McColl. Ele faleceu em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Mc Innes родился в 1448 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sarah McColl. Он умер в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
